sinks.expression: wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'custom-fonts' ), 403 )
wp_die( esc_html__( 'Security check failed. Please try again.', 'custom-fonts' ), 403 )

sanitizers.expression: esc_html( sprintf( __( 'Allow %s products to track non-sensitive usage tracking data.', 'custom-fonts' ), $args['title'] ) )
wp_kses_post( sprintf( '%2s', esc_url( $args['usage_doc_link'] ), __( 'Learn More.', 'custom-fonts' ) ) )
